title: Move activeBoardId / openBoardIds from Project to uiStore
reason: External audit (Codex + Gemini, both --external both) identified 2 HIGH risks (cross-store reactivity loss, MCP server activeBoardId being wiped) plus 4 MEDIUM. User chose Option A (wire-strip) instead — implemented directly in src/utils/apiSync.ts and mcp-server/src/index.ts with 20 LOC, no store refactor.

status_history.session: audit-spec internal PASS (4b 5/5, 5b 7/7); 跳過外部審查（--quick）；Rule 1 line-anchor 違規已修正

audit-spec external review (Codex + Gemini): 2 HIGH (cross-store reactivity loss; MCP activeBoardId wipeout) + 4 MEDIUM (v15 edge cases; persist hydration race; addActorBoard semantic; verification false negatives)

User chose Option A (wire-strip). Implemented directly without new spec — 20 LOC across apiSync.ts (debouncedPost destructure + sync_project dispatch preserve) and mcp-server/src/index.ts (POST handler prevActiveBoardId preservation).
